testcases.description: Verify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01TextUI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal. kitaboo.com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.description: Verify if user ia able to create math activity
testcases.expected: Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen
testcases.raw: TC_02Text FunctionalityVerify if user ia able to create math activity 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to start authoring
testcases.expected: Click on start authoring Should redirect to New Activity creation page
testcases.raw: TC_03Text FunctionalityVerify if user is able to start authoring 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info 5. Click on start authoring Should redirect to New Activity creation page

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to add Generic step
testcases.expected: Add Generic step User Should able add Generic step
testcases.raw: TC_04Text FunctionalityVerify if user is able to add Generic step 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step User Should able add Generic step

testcases.description: Verify if user able to enter the step title
testcases.expected: Enter the Step Title User Should able to Enter Data in Step Title
testcases.raw: TC_05Text FunctionalityVerify if user able to enter the step title 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title User Should able to Enter Data in Step Title

testcases.description: Verify that the cancel button is clickable in generic step creation
testcases.expected: click on cancel buttonThe step creation pop up should be closed
testcases.raw: TC_06Text Functionality Verify that the cancel button is clickable in generic step creation 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.click on cancel buttonThe step creation pop up should be closed

testcases.description: Verify that the change step button is clickable in generic step creation
testcases.expected: click on change step button Clicking on Change step should redirect to Chosse step screen
testcases.raw: TC_07Text Functionality Verify that the change step button is clickable in generic step creation 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.click on change step button Clicking on Change step should redirect to Chosse step screen

testcases.raw: TC_37Text PositiveVerify preview of text with all applied styles 1. Apply various styles to text. 2. Click Preview.All formatting appears correctly in Preview.

testcases.raw: TC_38Text PositiveVerify reset changes button 1. Make style or content changes. 2. Click 'Reset changes'.Text component resets to original state.

testcases.raw: TC_39Text PositiveVerify Apply to All functionality 1. Edit one text component. 2. Click 'Apply to All'. Same style and formatting applied to all similar components.

testcases.description: Verify text component without any content
testcases.raw: TC_40Text PositiveVerify text component without any content 1. Add a text component. 2. Do not enter any content. 3. Publish the activity. Empty space is rendered or component is hidden.
